op.ARDELIA.potential.1.event.description.text: Battle skill Dolly Rush improved: Consuming Corrosion now applies Physical Susceptibility and Arts Susceptibility with effects +8%.

op.ARDELIA.potential.2.event.description.text: Talent Friendly Presence improved: When the controlled operator touches the Shadow of Mr. Dolly, Ardelia also treats another allied operator with the lowest percentage HP with half of the treatment effects.

op.ARDELIA.potential.3.event.description.text: Ultimate Wooly Party improved: Duration +1s; chance to create Shadow of Mr. Dolly is increased to 1.2 times the original.

op.ARDELIA.potential.4.event.description.text: Ultimate Wooly Party improved: Ultimate Energy cost -15%.

op.ARDELIA.potential.5.event.description.text: Combo skill Eruption Column improved: Length of cooldown -{-coolDown:0}s; DMG multiplier is increased to 1.2 times the original; duration of Corrosion applied +4s.

op.ARDELIA.skill.DOLLY_RUSH.event.descri.text: Hops on Mr. Dolly and rams the target to deal Nature DMG. If the target has Corrosion, then consume the Corrosion and apply Physical Susceptibility and Arts Susceptibility to the target.

op.ARDELIA.skill.ERUPTION_COLUMN.event.d.text: When the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on an enemy with no stacks of Vulnerability or Arts Infliction. Launches a homing Volcanic Cloud at a target enemy that deals Nature DMG when close enough to the target. The Volcanic Cloud explodes after a short delay, dealing half of the Nature DMG and forcibly applying temporary Corrosion to nearby enemies.

op.ARDELIA.skill.MR_DOLLY_SHADOW.event.d.text: When the controlled operator touches a Shadow of Mr. Dolly, Ardelia restores that operator's HP. If the controlled operator is at max HP, heals the teammate with lowest percentage HP instead.

op.ARDELIA.skill.ROCKY_WHISPERS_BATK.eve.text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Nature DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.ARDELIA.skill.ROCKY_WHISPERS_DIVE.eve.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Nature DMG to nearby enemies.

op.ARDELIA.skill.ROCKY_WHISPERS_FINISHER.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Nature DMG and recovers some SP.

op.ARDELIA.skill.WOOLY_PARTY.event.descr.text: Ardelia enters a mobile channeling state and summons the aid of Mr. Dolly. Multiple copies of Mr. Dolly are thrown in random directions. Each copy deals Nature DMG when hitting the enemy. Each enemy can only take 1 damaging hit every s.

op.ARDELIA.talent.FRIENDLY_PRESENCE_TALE.text: The battle skill Dolly Rush creates 3 Shadows of Mr. Dolly after hitting the enemy. The copies of Mr. Dolly scattered by the ultimate Wooly Party also have a 10% chance to create Shadows of Mr. Dolly when they fall to the ground. When the controlled operator touches a Shadow of Mr. Dolly, Ardelia restores the said operator's HP by [63 + Will×0.53]. If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with lowest percentage HP. Shadows of Mr. Dolly last for 10s and up to 10 can exist in the battlefield.

op.ARDELIA.talent.MOUNTAINPEAK_SURFER_TA.text: Battle skill Dolly Rush improved: Triggering the additional effect while an enemy with Corrosion is nearby immediately casts the battle skill again. This effect only triggers once per active battle skill casting.
